scripts.build: npm run build:setup && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:css: cleancss -o dist/assets/css/main.css assets/css/main.css && cleancss -o dist/assets/css/components.css assets/css/components.css
scripts.build:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const d of ['docs','examples']){if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.cpSync(d,'dist/'+d,{recursive:true});}for(const f of ['.nojekyll']){if(fs.existsSync(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,'dist/'+f);}"
